programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Masters champion Scottie Scheffler gives Chris an inside look alongside longtime coach Randy Smith.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris and Randy dive into golf swing technique and discuss things such as ball position and club path that can help amateur golfers of any handicap.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris spends time with PGA Tour winner Carlos Ortiz and his coach, Justin Poynter.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris and Biomechanics professor, Dr. Young-Hoo Kwon, address what can be learned from analyzing the biomechanics of the golf swing.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris travels to the Sea Island Golf Performance Center where he meets up with Justin Parsons.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Todd presents the structure of his teaching, taking Chris all the way from developing a correct motion, to ways to implement on-course pressure into practice.

programme.title: Nathalie Filler Sheehan: Breaking 100

programme.title: Martin Hall: Breaking 90
programme.desc: Martin Hall brings out all the tools and analogies to help fix swing faults and poor strategies that are holding players back from shooting in the 80s.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to maximize distance with the driver. Martin analyzes the powerful swing of Dustin Johnson and teaches drills inspired by the 2020 FedExCup Champion.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to improve a bad round with a couple adjustments. Martin shares how to stop slices and hooks, how two tees can prevent thin shots, and what Greg Norman did to avoid hitting the ball fat.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: What to learn from past and current Ryder Cup players and captains. Learn drills to crush the driver like European captain Padraig Harrington and split the fairway like United States captain Steve Stricker.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal focus on impact position. Martin analyzes the swing of 2021 Open Champion Collin Morikawa, shares a drill used by legendary ball striker Johnny Miller, and reveals a tip on making solid contact from an unlikely source.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal analyze the world's best players to bust popular myths about the golf swing. Learn what "cover it" means to Rory McIlroy, a tip to dial in wedge shots like Jordan Spieth.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal reveal how the body works throughout the swing and teach drills to cure the biggest faults. Martin teaches a lower body move used by Greg Norman, analyzes the backswing of Martin Kaymer.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Find out how to crush the driver like 2021 PGA Championship winner Phil Mickelson, split the fairway under pressure like 2021 Masters champion Hideki Matsuyama, and sink breaking putts like 2021 U.S.Open Champion Jon Rahm.
